tasks.title: Implement Agent Edit Page with Dynamic Form Fields and Chat Interface
tasks.description: Create a comprehensive agent creation/editing page with dynamic form fields, chat interface, and full integration with Supabase, including proper authentication, database integration, and theme support.
tasks.details:
Implementation steps:

1. Page Structure and Components:
   - Create new pages/create-agent.tsx and pages/edit-agent/[id].tsx
   - Implement AgentForm component with dynamic field generation
   - Create ChatInterface component for agent interaction testing
   - Add AgentHeader component for metadata display

2. Database Integration:
   - Set up Supabase types for agents and agent_messages tables
   - Implement CRUD operations using supabase-js client
   - Create RLS policies for secure agent access:
     * Enable read access for authenticated users
     * Restrict write access to agent owners
     * Set up proper row-level security

3. Form Implementation:
   - Create dynamic form fields based on agent type:
     * Basic info (name, description, model)
     * Header parameters configuration
     * Body parameters with validation
     * Advanced settings section
   - Implement form validation using react-hook-form
   - Add real-time validation for API endpoints

4. Chat Interface:
   - Implement message threading with Supabase real-time subscriptions
   - Add message composition with markdown support
   - Create message history viewer with proper formatting
   - Implement error handling for API responses

5. Theme Integration:
   - Apply consistent styling using admin_settings theme
   - Implement responsive design for mobile/tablet
   - Add loading states and transitions
   - Create proper error feedback UI

6. Authentication & Security:
   - Integrate with existing auth system
   - Add proper route protection
   - Implement user-specific agent access
   - Set up secure API key handling

7. Utility Functions:
   - Create helpers for API parameter validation
   - Add type definitions for agent configurations
   - Implement error handling utilities
   - Add form state management helpers
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Unit Testing:
   - Test AgentForm component:
     * Verify dynamic field generation
     * Test form validation
     * Check parameter handling
     * Validate state management
   - Test ChatInterface component:
     * Verify message threading
     * Test real-time updates
     * Validate error handling
   - Test utility functions:
     * Verify API parameter validation
     * Test type checking
     * Validate error handling

2. Integration Testing:
   - Verify Supabase integration:
     * Test CRUD operations
     * Verify real-time subscriptions
     * Test RLS policies
   - Test authentication flow:
     * Verify route protection
     * Test user-specific access
     * Validate API key handling
   - Test theme integration:
     * Verify responsive design
     * Check theme consistency
     * Test dark/light mode

3. End-to-End Testing:
   - Complete agent creation flow
   - Test agent editing functionality
   - Verify chat interface operation
   - Validate form submission
   - Test error scenarios
   - Check mobile responsiveness

4. Security Testing:
   - Verify authentication requirements
   - Test RLS policy enforcement
   - Validate API key security
   - Check XSS prevention

subtasks.title: Set up Supabase Database Schema and RLS Policies
subtasks.description: Create database tables, types, and row-level security policies for agents and agent_messages
subtasks.details: Create agents table with columns: id, user_id, name, description, model, header_params, body_params, settings. Set up RLS policies to restrict read/write access to authenticated users and agent owners. Create agent_messages table with proper foreign key constraints.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify RLS policies using Supabase client in different auth contexts. Test CRUD operations with various user permissions.

subtasks.title: Implement Core AgentForm Component
subtasks.description: Create reusable form component with dynamic field generation based on agent type
subtasks.details:
Create components/AgentForm.tsx with react-hook-form integration. Implement dynamic field generation for basic info, header params, body params, and advanced settings. Add real-time validation and error handling.
<info added on 2025-07-11T02:33:12.272Z>
Implementation completed for AgentForm component in ai-agents/components/agent-form.tsx with comprehensive features:

Core form sections implemented including basic information (name, category, description, API URL, visibility), agent behavior configuration (role definition, system prompts), UI options (icon selection, chat placeholder, AI parameters), and dynamic HTTP headers and body parameters.

Dynamic form functionality includes:
- Conditional field rendering based on parameter types
- DropdownOptionsSection for managing select field choices
- Real-time form state management with react-hook-form
- Zod schema validation with error handling
- Dynamic arrays for headers and body parameters
- Proper data transformation for Supabase compatibility

Component features:
- TypeScript integration with proper type definitions
- Supabase CRUD operations integration
- Authentication handling
- Toast notifications for user feedback
- Responsive grid layouts
- Loading states and form submission handling
- Icon preview functionality
- Proper routing integration

Form structure aligns with repository data schema and handles both create and edit modes with appropriate data loading and transformation.
</info added on 2025-07-11T02:33:12.272Z>
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit test form validation, field generation, and state management. Test form submission with mock data.

subtasks.title: Develop Agent Creation and Edit Pages
subtasks.description: Implement pages for creating new agents and editing existing ones
subtasks.details:
Create pages/create-agent.tsx and pages/edit-agent/[id].tsx. Integrate AgentForm component with proper routing and state management. Implement loading states and error handling for form submissions.
<info added on 2025-07-11T02:33:29.646Z>
Successfully implemented create-agent page with complete authentication flow and component integration:

- Created ai-agents/create-agent/page.tsx and corresponding app/create-agent/page.tsx following project directory structure
- Integrated authentication using useAuth hook with loading states and unauthenticated user redirects
- Implemented AgentForm component in create mode with responsive container styling
- Added loading spinners, error handling, and proper navigation flow using Next.js router
- Followed project architectural patterns with TypeScript integration and clean code organization
- Page is accessible at /create-agent with full form functionality for authenticated users

Remaining: Implement edit-agent/[id].tsx page with similar patterns and functionality for existing agent editing.
</info added on 2025-07-11T02:33:29.646Z>
subtasks.testStrategy: E2E testing of agent creation and editing workflows. Test form persistence and navigation.

subtasks.title: Create ChatInterface Component
subtasks.description: Build interactive chat interface for testing agent responses
subtasks.details: Implement components/ChatInterface.tsx with message threading, real-time updates using Supabase subscriptions, and markdown support. Add message composition and history viewing functionality.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test real-time message updates, markdown rendering, and error handling for API responses.

subtasks.title: Integrate Authentication and Theme Support
subtasks.description: Add authentication checks and apply consistent styling across components
subtasks.details: Implement route protection using NextAuth. Apply admin_settings theme to all components. Add responsive design support and loading states. Set up secure API key handling and user-specific agent access.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test authentication flows, theme consistency across viewports, and protected route access.

tasks.title: Create My Agents Admin Dashboard Page
tasks.description: Develop a secure /my-agents page in the ai-agents folder that displays a table of agents from Supabase, accessible only to users with admin privileges, featuring agent details and edit functionality.
tasks.details:
Implementation steps:

1. Page Setup:
   - Create new file /ai-agents/my-agents.tsx
   - Import necessary components and hooks from existing codebase
   - Implement admin access control using patterns from /admin-settings
   - Set up Supabase query for agents table

2. Table Component Implementation:
   - Create AgentsTable component with specified columns:
     * icon (render from config JSON)
     * is_public (boolean display)
     * category
     * agent_name
     * api_url
     * Edit button linking to /edit-agent/{agent_id}
   - Implement sorting and pagination
   - Add loading states and error handling

3. Styling and Theme Integration:
   - Import theme utilities from admin_settings
   - Implement responsive design using existing breakpoint patterns
   - Ensure proper dark/light mode support
   - Style table according to existing design system

4. Data Management:
   - Set up real-time subscription for agent updates
   - Implement proper error boundaries
   - Add loading states and empty states
   - Handle data refresh on updates

5. Security Implementation:
   - Verify existing RLS policies for agents table
   - Implement admin-only access check
   - Add proper error handling for unauthorized access
   - Ensure secure data fetching patterns

6. Performance Optimization:
   - Implement proper data caching
   - Add pagination support
   - Optimize image loading for agent icons
   - Use proper memoization for table components
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Security Testing:
   - Verify admin-only access works correctly
   - Test unauthorized access attempts
   - Validate RLS policies are working
   - Check secure data handling

2. Functional Testing:
   - Verify all table columns display correctly
   - Test sorting and pagination
   - Validate edit button navigation
   - Check real-time updates
   - Test theme switching
   - Verify icon rendering

3. UI/UX Testing:
   - Test responsive design across breakpoints
   - Verify dark/light mode transitions
   - Check loading states and animations
   - Validate error messages
   - Test empty state displays

4. Performance Testing:
   - Measure initial load time
   - Test table performance with large datasets
   - Verify proper caching behavior
   - Monitor memory usage

5. Integration Testing:
   - Test integration with Supabase
   - Verify navigation flow
   - Check theme integration
   - Test admin settings integration
